title: delissea sinuata subsp. lanaiensis
intro: Delissea sinuata subsp. lanaiensis is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae), native to the island of Lanai in Hawaii. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems were used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Delissea sinuata subsp. lanaiensis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves and stems, and are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or topical applications.
